## Goal

Build the complete narrative structure for the project so the story reads clearly from top to bottom and no section is still using placeholder content.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] 6-8 total sections
- [ ] 5+ JavaScript concepts represented
- [ ] Narrative complete (no placeholder text)

## Files / Links

- Likely files:
  - `index.html`
  - `styles/`
  - `scripts/`
- Preview URL:
- Figma:
- Motion Map:
- Related issue(s):

## Constraints

- Keep this issue focused on story flow, section structure, and content readiness.
- Use semantic HTML and readable heading hierarchy.
- Replace placeholder text before closing the issue.

## Verification

- [ ] Full page reads clearly from top to bottom
- [ ] Browser check completed on desktop and mobile width
- [ ] Console checked for blocking errors
- [ ] Evidence added below

## Agent Handoff

Work this issue in my repo. Follow the Goal, Definition of Done, Files / Links, Constraints, and Verification sections. Do not change files outside the listed scope without approval. When done, report what changed, how you verified it, and any open risks before I close the issue.

## Evidence

- [ ] Commit(s) linked
- [ ] Screenshot of full page section flow
